case_title: COREAS, ORLANDO ANTOINIO VS JONES, SARAH J.M. DBA LAW OFFICES OF SARAH J.M.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COREAS, ORLANDO ANTOINIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JONES, SARAH J.M. DBA LAW OFFICES OF SARAH J.M. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-16-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, SARAH J.M. DBA LAW OFFICES OF SARAH J.M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-23-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING A SPANISH INTERPRETER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-23-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-11-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF'S INTERPRETER DID NOT SHOW UP FOR COURT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COREAS, ORLANDO ANTOINIO AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, SARAH J.M. DBA LAW OFFICES OF SARAH J.M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-12-2005, OFF CALENDAR
